.file-embed.background: rgb(249, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-property-key.background: color(srgb 0.91888 0.8872 0.9928) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(249, 249, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--bases-cards-shadow-hover: 0 0 0 1px hsl(from hsl(258 25% calc(100% - 1 * 14%)) h s calc(l - 5 * 1))
body.--i-active-line-highlight-inactive: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) 0.65 c h / 0.1) l c h / 0.05)
body.--i-editor-border-hover: hsl(from hsl(258 25% calc(100% - 1 * 14%)) h s calc(l - 5 * 1))
body.--i-link-underline-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) 50% 35% h) l c h / 0.25)
body.--indentation-guide-color-active: hsl(from hsl(258 25% calc(100% - 1 * 14%)) h s calc(l - 5 * 1))
body.--text-accent-hover: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) 50% 35% h) calc(l - 0.15) c h)

div.callout-title.background: rgba(8, 109, 221, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(162, 150, 192, 0.18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(162, 150, 192, 0.18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(221, 217, 232) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(221, 217, 232) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(238, 236, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
